title: IPO-anchored VWAP
question: What is the win-rate of buying the IPO-anchored VWAP, by horizon and across sectors?
finding: No edge. Buying the touch is a coin flip (~49% win-rate; edge over random within ±3.6pts) across 881 IPOs / 188 liquid names; the 90-day bootstrap CI spans zero, it holds out-of-sample, and no sector edge is robust.
